</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/contractors/{contractor_uuid}/documents"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get a list of all contractor's documents

scope: `contractor_documents:read`
